♦ An Eternal Union ♦

Devashish ❤️ Annu

Two hearts that found their way to each other,
now take a step into forever —
and they'd love for you to walk alongside.

Celebrate With Us

18 – 19 April 2025  ·  Mannat Resort, Paota

With Joy & Blessings

You Are Warmly Invited

❧

With hearts full of love and eyes brimming with joy, we — the families of Devashish and Annu — joyfully announce the coming together of two souls, two families, and two stories into one beautiful journey.

✦

As they begin this sacred new chapter, they seek your love, your laughter, and your blessings. Because celebrations feel incomplete without those who matter most — and you are one of them.

❧

Join us across two days of music, rituals, colour and joy, as we celebrate the most beautiful thing in the world — love in bloom.

G/S/O. Smt. Gheesi Devi & Sh. Jagdish Prasad Choudhary Devashish S/O. Smt. Hema Choudhary & Sh. Shish Ram Jat
— With —

A stunning resort nestled in the serene surroundings of Paota, Mannat Resort offers a royal backdrop perfectly befitting this celebration of love — where every corner is adorned with beauty and every moment is touched with magic.

Some moments are just meant to be shared —
with family, with friends, with the ones who have
been part of our story from the very beginning.

Your presence would mean the world to us.
Your blessings, our greatest treasure.

Devashish ❤️ Annu
